global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and straightforward service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, possibly a circle and a square, outlined in a simple style.

elements.label: Background pattern
elements.description: A textured background that appears to be a solid color with a subtle grid pattern overlay.

elements.label: Overlay graphic
elements.description: An overlay graphic that complements the central element, possibly with a transparent effect.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Secure & simple' with a smaller line below it saying 'No hidden fees', prominently displayed.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'SwiftStack' in a large, bold font at the top of the ad, likely in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Watch now' in a clear, inviting font, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, simple and modern, secure service message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple, No hidden fees, SwiftStack, Watch now
